message:
feat(config): add degradation policy configuration options (rust_proxy-ny9)

Add DegradationPolicy enum with four variants:
- FailClosed (default): Reject connections when no healthy proxy
- TryAll: Try each proxy in order until one works
- UseLast: Use the most recently healthy proxy
- Direct: Connect without proxy (requires allow_direct_fallback)

Add three new Settings fields:
- degradation_policy: Controls behavior when all proxies are unhealthy
- degradation_delay_secs: Debounce delay before applying degradation (default 5s)
- allow_direct_fallback: Must be true for Direct policy

Add validation:
- Error if degradation_policy=direct without allow_direct_fallback=true
- Warning if degradation_delay_secs=0 (no debounce)

This unblocks 4 downstream beads for implementing the actual policies.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
